features: The high-performance deodorant with extracts of aloe vera.
Contains the new fragrance capsule technology MotionSense System
48h dry control with pleasant fresh scent.
Won't let you down when things get stressful.
description: Product Description Rexona Women Aloe Vera: The powerful deodorant with extracts of Aloe Vera and 48 hour dryness control won't let you down, even in stressful or exciting moments and is especially kind to the skin. Rexona Women Aloe Vera, with a pleasantly fresh fragrance with notes of cucumber, watermelon and violets, and the MotionSense System motion-activated fragrance capsule technology provides protection, before you get hot and bothered. Aloe Vera is known for its nourishing effects and positive effects on the skin - a gift of nature. What is the "MotionSense system" and how does it work? Microcapsules are applied to the skin surface by using Rexona deodorants with MotionSense Technology The MotionSense scent capsules are activated by movement. The envelope of the microcapsules is ground up and thus releases the contained additional fragrance substances. Thanks to the innovative MotionSense formulation, Rexona is the first deodorant that protects before you sweat. Directions Clean and dry underarm area before application, apply a thin, even layer, allow to dry before dressing
